gS dqy ykxr ¼djksM+ #i, esa½ ckbikl dk uke izkjEHk gksdj feyrs gq, e/; izns'k jkT; esa Xokfy;j ftys esa esgjk xkao ds ikl 32- 607 fd-eh- ¼fo|eku 32-607 fd-eh-½ Xokfy;j ckbikl 0-000 ¼jkjk&3 dk fo|eku 103-000 fd-eh- ½ 42-033 ¼jkjk&75 dk fo|eku 16 fd-eh-½ 41-606 ¼60 ehVj ls vf/kd dh yEckbZ okyh lajpukvksa dks NksM+dj½ 300-93 dqy 41-606 [Qk-la- Hkkjkjkizk@lhvks@14&15@vkxjk&Xokfy;j ¼8-00&103-00½ ,oa Xokfy;j ckbikl@vks,eVh] vyds'k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th September, 2015 S.O. 2483(E).— Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 published vide G.S.R 838(E) dated 5th December, 2008 and amended vide G.S.R 950(E) dated 3rd December, 2010, G.S.R 15(E) dated 12th January, 2011, G.S.R 1756(E) dated 12th October, 2011, G.S.R 778(E) dated 16th December, 2013 and G.S.R. 26(E) dated 16.01.2014, the Central Government, vide notification S.O. 3319(E) dated 30.12.2014, authorized M/s Agra-Gwalior Pathways Private Limited to collect and retain the fee for Operation and Maintenance of Agra-Gwalior section from km 8.000 to km 103.000 of NH-3 & Operation of toll plaza at km 32.607 for Gwalior Bypass section from km 0.000 (existing km 103.000 of NH-3) to km 42.033 (existing km 16 of NH-75) in the States of Uttar Pradesh, Rajasthan & Madhya Pradesh on Operation, Maintenance & Transfer (OMT) basis; Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules 2008 and amended vide G.S.R 950(E) dated 3rd December, 2010, G.S.R 15(E) dated 12th January, 2011, G.S.R 1756(E) dated 12th October, 2011, G.S.R 778(E) dated 16th December, 2013 and G.S.R. 26(E) dated 16.01.2014, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification published vide S.O. 3319(E) dated 30.12.2014. The para 2 of notes shall be substituted as follows: “2. In additional to above, the following fee shall also be due and payable for the use of the following bypass costing Rs. 10 crore or more, at the following Toll Plaza, at 150% times the base rate mentioned in Table-I above for the length of bypass specified for such Toll Plaza: Location of Toll Plaza(s) (Design chainage) Design Chainages Length of bypass (in km) for which additional fee is payable Total Cost (Rs. in crore) Name of Bypass Taking off at Merging at At km 32.607 (existing km 32.607), near Village Mehra in District Gwalior in the State of MP. Gwalior Bypass 0.000 (existing km 103.000 of NH-3) 42.033 (existing km 16 of NH- 75) 41.606 (Excluding structures >60m length) 300.93 Total 41.606 [F. No. NHAI/ CO / 14-15/Agra-Gwalior (8.00-103.00) & Gwalior Bypass/OMT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
